# Open Workbook

> Local Excel agent runtime that gives any MCP-capable agent one safe tool, `excel.agent.run`, for live desktop Excel workbooks.

Open Workbook lets agents work with live desktop Excel through an Office.js add-in and local TypeScript backend. The backend owns workbook discovery, target resolution, preview/apply safety, validation, backups, rollback, compact proof, and multi-agent coordination while MCP clients see one public tool.

Key patterns:
- **One-tool agent surface**: normal MCP clients call `excel.agent.run`; primitive Excel capabilities stay backend-owned.
- **Local-first Excel runtime**: MCP server, backend broker, Office.js add-in, and CLI run locally.
- **Safety lifecycle**: Mutations go through permissions, scoped locks, snapshots, backups, fingerprint checks, Office.js execution, validation, audit events, and rollback metadata.
- **Template fidelity**: Registered templates, style fingerprints, formula pattern checks, table/filter/sort preservation, validation, and repair workflows.
- **Fast reads/writes**: Range and batch operations use Office.js payloads instead of per-cell automation.
- **Multi-agent coordination**: Task registry, leases, transaction queue, conflict guidance, rollback preview, and rollback chains.
- **Capability honesty**: Host-limited Office.js paths return explicit warnings or `CAPABILITY_UNAVAILABLE` instead of pretending to work.

Install:

```bash
npx -y @components-kit/open-workbook setup
```

MCP launch command:

```bash
npx -y @components-kit/open-workbook@latest mcp
```

Skill install:

```bash
npx skills add components-kit/open-workbook --skill open-workbook-excel
```

Agent instruction source:

- `skills/open-workbook-excel/SKILL.md`
- `skills/open-workbook-excel/references/`

## Docs

- [Full LLM Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/components-kit/open-workbook/main/llms-full.txt): Complete generated project reference in one file
- [Agent Skill: Open Workbook Excel](https://github.com/components-kit/open-workbook/tree/main/skills/open-workbook-excel): Router skill for fast, reliable live Excel automation through Open Workbook MCP
- [Agent Run Reference](https://github.com/components-kit/open-workbook/blob/main/skills/open-workbook-excel/references/agent-run.md): `excel.agent.run` modes, structured intent, preview/apply, multilingual routing, and proof handling
- [Capability Map](https://github.com/components-kit/open-workbook/blob/main/skills/open-workbook-excel/references/capability-map.md): Backend-owned action groups used behind the one public tool
- [README](https://github.com/components-kit/open-workbook/blob/main/README.md): Project overview, architecture, setup, and safety contract
- [Installation](https://github.com/components-kit/open-workbook/blob/main/docs/installation.md): npx setup, MCP launch command, and Excel add-in startup flow
- [MCP Clients](https://github.com/components-kit/open-workbook/blob/main/docs/mcp-clients.md): Generic MCP client configuration
- [Generic Instructions](https://github.com/components-kit/open-workbook/blob/main/docs/instructions.md): skills.sh install and fallback agent instructions
- [Tool Surface](https://github.com/components-kit/open-workbook/blob/main/docs/tool-surface.md): Stable, preview, and capability-limited MCP tools
- [Architecture](https://github.com/components-kit/open-workbook/blob/main/docs/architecture.md): Runtime components and catalog policy
- [Backup Lifecycle](https://github.com/components-kit/open-workbook/blob/main/docs/backup-lifecycle.md): Snapshot, file backup, restore, retention, and rollback model
- [Template System](https://github.com/components-kit/open-workbook/blob/main/docs/template-system.md): Template detection, registration, creation, validation, and repair
- [Style Fidelity](https://github.com/components-kit/open-workbook/blob/main/docs/style-fidelity.md): Style fingerprints and native Office.js format copy behavior
- [Formula Intelligence](https://github.com/components-kit/open-workbook/blob/main/docs/formula-intelligence.md): Formula patterns, dependencies, validation, repair, and explanations
- [Tables, Filters, and Sorts](https://github.com/components-kit/open-workbook/blob/main/docs/table-filter-sort.md): Table, filter, and sort operations
- [PivotTables and Charts](https://github.com/components-kit/open-workbook/blob/main/docs/pivot-chart.md): Pivot/chart creation, validation, fingerprints, repair, and capability limits
- [Multi-Agent Runtime](https://github.com/components-kit/open-workbook/blob/main/docs/multi-agent-runtime.md): Tasks, locks, serialized commits, conflicts, and rollback chains
- [Workbook File Lifecycle](https://github.com/components-kit/open-workbook/blob/main/docs/workbook-file-lifecycle.md): Save-as, export copy, native file bridge, and full-file backup restore
- [Performance Contract](https://github.com/components-kit/open-workbook/blob/main/docs/performance.md): Batch sizing and latency expectations
- [Production Readiness](https://github.com/components-kit/open-workbook/blob/main/docs/production-readiness.md): Release gates and known host limitations
- [OpenCode Configuration](https://github.com/components-kit/open-workbook/blob/main/docs/opencode.md): OpenCode MCP setup
- [Packaging and Publishing](https://github.com/components-kit/open-workbook/blob/main/docs/packaging.md): Package layout, package dry run, and publish checklist
- [Release Process](https://github.com/components-kit/open-workbook/blob/main/docs/release.md): Version policy, release checklist, tag flow, and deferred npm publishing steps
- [Sideloading](https://github.com/components-kit/open-workbook/blob/main/docs/sideloading.md): Excel add-in sideloading on macOS and Windows
- [Changelog](https://github.com/components-kit/open-workbook/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md): Versioned release notes

## Packages

- [@components-kit/open-workbook-protocol](https://github.com/components-kit/open-workbook/tree/main/packages/protocol): Public agent tool contract, internal capability catalog, JSON-RPC contracts, resources, prompts, errors, and workbook types
- [@components-kit/open-workbook-excel-core](https://github.com/components-kit/open-workbook/tree/main/packages/excel-core): Planning, backups, snapshots, templates, fingerprints, permissions, locks, and transactions
- [@components-kit/open-workbook-office-js-engine](https://github.com/components-kit/open-workbook/tree/main/packages/office-js-engine): Office.js engine adapter contracts
- [@components-kit/open-workbook](https://github.com/components-kit/open-workbook/tree/main/packages/cli): `owb` CLI for generic setup, MCP, add-in serving, sideloading, diagnostics, and fallback instructions
- [@components-kit/open-workbook-backend](https://github.com/components-kit/open-workbook/tree/main/apps/backend): Local broker and runtime service
- [@components-kit/open-workbook-mcp-server](https://github.com/components-kit/open-workbook/tree/main/apps/mcp-server): MCP stdio server
- [@components-kit/open-workbook-excel-addin](https://github.com/components-kit/open-workbook/tree/main/apps/excel-addin): Office.js add-in runtime
